title: 可立中學教畜對學生發表之不正當言論

replies.msg:
事件發生係12月13號星期五，喺大約五六七名學生參加完校外既和你lunch後，呢位可立中學姓文嘅教畜,就對佢所執教嘅初中學生講出以下言論。錄音中更有一名同學，因被發現正在錄音，而未知會承受到怎樣的打壓，希望各位可以幫下手，推到令學校回應，剷除教畜

https://youtu.be/hMEMa7BOMXI

replies.msg:
‼️‼️‼️可立人和理非決戰文小燕回合‼️‼️‼️
Send to:
hlc-mail@apps.holap.edu.hk

CC:
info@holap.org.hk
info@siksikyuen.org.hk

Dear Principal Pang,

I am writing to express my disappointment and anger towards the recent speech on the Internet delivered by Miss Man Siu Yin at Ho Lap College.

First, she is not fulfilling her roles as a teacher. From the recording, she repeatedly expressed her support to Hong Kong Police Force regardless of their violence towards peaceful protesters. As a responsible teacher, I believe it is her duty to guide students to think critically and objectively. It is disappointing that she was trying to convince students to support the Hong Kong Police Force, even though there are hundreds of thousands of news proving their brutality. Her behavior completely violated our school’s motto - To act benevolently and to teach benevolence.
More importantly, she conveyed the wrong set of values to our treasurable next generation. Throughout the whole recording, she repeatedly emphasized the importance of money and power. Basic human rights and freedom of speech are despised. At the same time, she kept questioning students if they had the qualifications to express views as they are not legal voters. It is shameful that a teacher looks down on our students instead of making good use of own citizens’ rights in this civilized city. I am afraid that students at Ho Lap College would deeply believe in such ‘money comes first’ values if there is no further action taken to rectify.

All in all, it is sad and shocking for me and other alumni to hear such an inappropriate speech coming from a teacher of my alma mater. I look forward to your prompt action and reply.

Yours Sincerely,
(你個名)
HLC Alumnus
